proposal.subject: Re: Question
proposal.body:
Hallo Goswin,

Dank voor je interesse. Ceylon Seva (Pvt) Ltd is een Sri Lankaans uitzend- en detacheringsbureau. Het bedrijf is geregistreerd in Unawatuna en is actief over het hele eiland.

Ceylon Seva AI Assistant
proposal.in_reply_to_summary: Goswin asked in Dutch how to register with Ceylon Seva.
proposal.actor_justification: Trust class per matrix: insider / co-director (Goswin, co-director). Sensitivity: public info + standard biz info — content describes the company in already-published terms (name, jurisdiction, business model). No commitments. No third-party NDA material — the carve-out does not apply. Language mirrored (Dutch in, Dutch out).
